		intrigue = 2
		monthly_prestige = 0.3
	}

	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { always = yes }
				desc = murim_phantom_blade_elder_desc
			}
		}
	}
}

	index = 637
	category = education

	modifier = {
		prowess = 2
		intrigue = 1
	}

	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { always = yes }
				desc = demonic_aptitude_1_desc
			}
		}
	}
}

alchemist_1 = {
	index = 638
	category = education

	modifier = {
		learning = 2
		stewardship = 1
	}

	desc = {
		first_valid = {
			triggered_desc = {
				trigger = { always = yes }
				desc = alchemist_1_desc
			}
		}
	}
}
